title: Vision of Love
why_this_song: Vision of Love by Mariah Carey (1990) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "vision" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "vision" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "through" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "through" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Carried the weight on my own

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I had a vision of love

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Vision of Love" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Vision of Love" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Vision of Love" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Vision of Love"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Mariah Carey one question about "Vision of Love", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Mariah Carey sobre "Vision of Love", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Vision of Love" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Vision of Love" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?
